mapper.select: SELECT contact_email, company, partner_code, role, is_active AS active, created_at, updated_at FROM dbo.EXTERNAL_USER ORDER BY partner_code, contact_email
SELECT contact_email, company, partner_code, role, is_active AS active, created_at, updated_at FROM dbo.EXTERNAL_USER WHERE contact_email = #{contactEmail}
SELECT contact_email FROM dbo.EXTERNAL_USER WHERE partner_code = #{partnerCode} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY contact_email
SELECT DISTINCT partner_code FROM dbo.EXTERNAL_USER ORDER BY partner_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.EXTERNAL_USER (contact_email, company, partner_code, role, is_active) VALUES (#{contactEmail}, #{company}, #{partnerCode}, #{role}, #{active})
mapper.update: UPDATE dbo.EXTERNAL_USER SET company = #{company}, partner_code = #{partnerCode}, role = #{role}, is_active = #{active}, updated_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE contact_email = #{contactEmail}
